survey design show all pages
ORP SURVEY- STATE BODIES AND AGENCIES 
preview
Introduction
In the following questionnaire Hudson, on behalf of the Organisational Review Team, would like to
get your views and opinions on how your parent Department interacts and works with you in relation
to areas such as strategy, managing delivery and evaluation.
We would encourage you to be as open and frank in your responses as you can. Your responses
will only be seen by Hudson and the Organisational Review Programme team. They will not be seen
by your parent Department.
Name of your office, body or agency
Name of your parent Department
Level of interaction
Please describe briefly the substance of your organisation’s main interactions with your
parent Department, in terms of (a) face to face meetings; (b) formal reporting; and state
the frequency of both of these
(a). Face to Face Meetings (including frequency)
(b). Formal Reporting (including frequency)
http://surveymanager.hudson.com/pages/Design/DesignMasterGeneric.aspx?lang=EN_I...27/06/08
Survey ManagerPage 2 of 9
Strategy
Please tell us about your level of satisfaction with regard to how your parent Department consults with
you when its strategy is being developed and updated.
Please describe the role, if any, your parent Department plays in the development and monitoring of
your organisation’s (a) strategy/long term planning process; (b) output, outcome, performance
indicators and targets; and (c) how effective is their level of involvement
(a). Strategy/long term planning process
http://surveymanager.hudson.com/pages/Design/DesignMasterGeneric.aspx?lang=EN_I...27/06/08
Survey ManagerPage 3 of 9
(b). Output, outcome, performance indicators and targets
(c). How effective is your parent Department's level of involvement?
Please comment on the clarity of the division between the role of your parent Department and your
http://surveymanager.hudson.com/pages/Design/DesignMasterGeneric.aspx?lang=EN_I...27/06/08
Survey ManagerPage 4 of 9
organisation; and the degree to which this is clearly understood and accepted by all.
Please comment on how your parent Department leads the sector in which you operate.
What is the greatest challenge facing your parent Department in its leadership of the sector in which you
operate?
http://surveymanager.hudson.com/pages/Design/DesignMasterGeneric.aspx?lang=EN_I...27/06/08
Survey ManagerPage 5 of 9
Using the four point scale from highly satisfied to highly dissatisfied please identify your level of
satisfaction with regard to how well your parent Department sets strategic direction for the sector in
which you operate
nmlkj Highly satisfied nmlkj Satisfied nmlkj Dissatisfied nmlkj Highly dissatisfied
Managing Delivery
What role, if any, does your parent Department play in relation to monitoring the satisfaction of your
customers?
Please comment on the role you feel your parent Department should take in this regard.
Please describe your level of satisfaction with the manner that your parent Department exercises its
corporate governance oversight of your organisation.
http://surveymanager.hudson.com/pages/Design/DesignMasterGeneric.aspx?lang=EN_I...27/06/08
Survey ManagerPage 6 of 9
Where appropriate, does your parent Department engage in meaningful discussions on resource
allocation for your organisation?
Using the four point scale from highly satisfied to highly dissatisfied please identify your level of
satisfaction with regard to how well your parent Department manages the relationship with your
organisation.
nmlkj Highly satisfied nmlkj Satisfied nmlkj Dissatisfied nmlkj Highly dissatisfied
Evaluation
Please describe the way in which your parent Department seeks feedback from your organisation.
http://surveymanager.hudson.com/pages/Design/DesignMasterGeneric.aspx?lang=EN_I...27/06/08
Survey ManagerPage 7 of 9
How effective is it in dealing with challenging feedback?
Does your parent Department take account of your feedback in the development of its policies, strategies
and practices?
Using the four point scale from highly satisfied to highly dissatisfied please identify your level of
satisfaction with regard to how well your parent Department manages and responds to feedback.
nmlkj Highly satisfied nmlkj Satisfied nmlkj Dissatisfied nmlkj Highly dissatisfied
General comments
What do you feel is your parent Department's main strength?

What do you feel is your parent Department's main weakness?
What do you feel is your parent Department's main challenge for the future?
What would you change about your parent Department?
